PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?president ?presidentLabel ?age WHERE {
  ?president wdt:P39 wd:Q5708511 .
  ?president wdt:P509 ?cause .
  VALUES ?cause {
    wd:Q10737 wd:Q3882219
  }
  .
  ?president wdt:P569 ?birth .
  ?president wdt:P570 ?death .
  ?president rdfs:label ?presidentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?presidentLabel) = 'en')
  .
  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?birth) , 1 , 4)) AS ?birthYear)
  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?death) , 1 , 4)) AS ?deathYear)
  BIND(?deathYear - ?birthYear AS ?age)
}
ORDER BY ?president
